name: White Fruitcake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups (1 3/4 pounds) mixed diced fruits and peels for fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix fruits and peels, dates, apricots, figs, raisins, almonds, and coconut.
2. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt; sprinkle 1/2 cup over fruit mixture, mixing well.
3. Thoroughly cream shortening, sugar, and flavoring.
4. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Add dry ingredients to creamed mixture alternately with pineapple juice, beating well after each addition.
6. Add the fruit mixture, stirring until well mixed.
7. Line two 8 1/2 x 4 x 2 1/2 inch loaf pans with paper, allowing 1/2 inch to extend above all sides of pan. (Or bake in smaller pans.)
8. Pour batter into pans, filling 3/4 full.
9. Bake in very slow oven (275°F) for 2 1/2 hours or until done. (Have a pan of water on the bottom shelf of the oven while baking.)
10. Makes about 5 pounds.
